name: Italian Hot Cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, mix together 1/2 cup of cocoa powder, 1/3 cup of white sugar, and 1 teaspoon of cornstarch with 1/4 cup of water.
2. Stir constantly until the mixture comes to a boil.
3. Add 2 cups of liquid (water, brewed coffee, skim milk) to the saucepan. The author recommended using equal parts water and skim milk.
4. Stir over heat until the mixture is heated through and well mixed.
This produces a thick, rich brew that is highly chocolate-concentrated and not suitable for children. It contains minimal calories and fat from the cocoa itself.
